VAL-OBS-001.evidence: PipelineMetricsIT test 'should record step duration for all steps after successful pipeline run' PASSED — runs full pipeline with MockLlmAdapter + WireMock, queries SimpleMeterRegistry for pipeline.step.duration timer tagged by each step (PLANNER, SEARCH, RESEARCHER, CRITIC, COMPOSER), verifies each timer has count=1 and non-negative duration
VAL-OBS-001.testMethod: should record step duration for all steps after successful pipeline run

VAL-OBS-002.evidence: PipelineMetricsIT test 'should record token usage for LLM agents after pipeline run' PASSED — runs full pipeline with MetricsRecordingLlmPort wrapping MockLlmAdapter, queries SimpleMeterRegistry for pipeline.tokens.input and pipeline.tokens.output counters tagged by agent (planner, researcher, critic, composer), verifies each counter has count > 0
VAL-OBS-002.testMethod: should record token usage for LLM agents after pipeline run
